name: GAME OF SPY
original_name: ゲーム・オブ・スパイ
overview: Hashiba Takeru is the leader of Global Operation Service (GOS), a secret spy organization housed within the Public Security Investigation Bureau which is tasked with eradicating criminals who are targeting Japan for various reasons.
